items.name: spa/poke/a8d7951: [front] surface MCP Snowflake credential form errors (#24543)
items.summary:
The keypair credential form silently returned null from submit() whenever
react-hook-form validation failed, so users saw "Connect" do nothing and
the MCP tool stayed disconnected without any feedback.
